title: A Store That Doesn't Want to Sell Anything
text: I registered on the website, tried to order a laptop, entered all the details, but instead of charging me and sending the product, they froze my account, demanding various verification documents. I sent them over. They said they would review them within 24 hours. In reality, it's been a week, and no one can help or give any (truthful) estimate of when it will be resolved; they just tell me to 'wait.' I've never seen such a horrible marketplace in my life. I hope those who came up with this can't buy food in a store, receiving a 'document review request' that takes forever to process.

title: Amazon has become a joke!!!
text: Amazon has become a complete and utter joke of a company! They consistently lose orders, do not deliver on time, and their customer service, if you can understand the person you are speaking to, is nonexistent at best!!! I ordered birthday gifts for a special needs little girl and paid extra to have them delivered quickly! You guessed it…the items were never delivered!!! And, customer service claims there is nothing they can do until the items are delivered! Seriously? The issue IS they can’t deliver the items ordered, nor can they locate them! Stay away from this joke of a company! They have perhaps the worst customer service of any company, ever!!! And, they are destroying brick and mortar local businesses. I will now shop locally and save myself the headaches that go with dealing with Amazon!!!

title: Bought Damaged Books From Amazon
text: Recently purchased 2 books from Amazon. Both were damaged when delivered by the USPS when they tried to stuff the books in my small mailbox. Just received the replacement books and one of them has a damaged back cover that looks like it was put in the delivery envelope with the damage already. Don’t buy ANY books from Amazon. They are going to send you already damaged books.

title: Poor service
text: Amazon told me my parcel would be delivered,driver turned up no parcel,I phoned Amazon and was told parcel on its way,few hours later I was told parcel would be delivered by 10pm at midnight I received email that parcel could not be delivered as damaged, all day I waited in and two long phone calls and kept telling me my parcel is on its way, poor service, Amazon has gone down hill,not as good it was years ago, customer service is very poor.

title: Amazon service is getting worse every…
text: Amazon service is getting worse every month, my item was damaged in transit and returned back to vendor. I spent 2 hours on the phone with Amazon customer service, they transferred me to 5 different agents and finally never resolved the issue. Definitely need to look for some better online store.

title: Disgraceful service
text: Disgraceful service. Waited all day for a parcel being sent to me. Delivery driver called me to say he was on my street so I waited outside for 15 minutes, only to get a notification that said I wasn't in and the delivery had failed. Can't get in contact with Amazon to complain and won't be able to stay home all day again as I have a job.

title: I ordered an Apple Magic keyboard
text: I ordered an Apple Magic keyboard, received a wooden picture frame. I have to now go through the rigmarole of returning the item before I can get a refund..

title: Bad service
text: If I could give 0 stars, I would! Twice this week our delivery has been left on the front doorstep, in full view of anyone walking/driving by. Instructions are to be left in the greenhouse if no answers but our driver either can not read, doesn’t understand English or just can’t be arsed! Even leaving a polite note on the front door stating to NOT LEAVE PARCELS ON THE DOORSTEP had no effect and came home to parcels left on doorstep once again! Getting as bad as EVRI!

title: I am absolutely frustrated and angry at…
text: I am absolutely frustrated and angry at the service I am receiving. Please do not buy electrical purchases from an international Trying to return an item is a nightmare Bought table top dishwasher . No plumbing required when it clearly does need to be plumbed as it needs to connect to a water outlet to work. Made of cheap plastic.I have tried parcel companies as I have been given an address in the UK to send this back to . However this is classed as prohibited and most will not take it .and will not cover the insurance if anything happens to it Despite emails back and forth to couriers who are now quoting me £119 to send it back ! (Product cost £170)Despite emails / e chats to amazon I am getting no were. Very unhelpfulHappy to take it to a amazon hub / warehouse but not been given that option either They keep passing the buck . A to z guarantee obviously does not work Terrible treatment

title: You don't need to care once you've conquered the world
text: The delivery contractor they're using in my area (Intelcom) is horrendous. They don't have a pickup location so if you're not home when they show up, they keep the package and come back another day. You never know for sure when it will be, so you have to play cat and mouse with them, sometimes for days. They seem to think that everyone is unemployed and sitting home all day. They call when they get to your place, and if you're not there, sometimes the drivers get upset. I once had one threatening to return the package after three attempts, but he always came while I was at work. If they could at least give a clear idea of when to expect them, that would help. "Between 8am and 10pm" is not exactly what I would call clear. It's infuriating. That contractor can only afford to be that bad because their main client has obliterated the competition and doesn't need to care about the quality of the service anymore. I don't think my bad review will shake them out of their mediocrity, but it feels good to vent and I hope it will provide some relief to the readers who have had a similar experience.

title: Worst experience with a supposedly big and able company
text: Got sent the wrong item. Amazon refused to be responsible for shipping it back. What makes it worse is that it took me 2 hours to get this answer because of all the robotic CS replies on the way.

title: RETURN & SIGNATURE CARD NIGHTMARE DONT BOTHER
text: I tried returning something; 1) Never rec'd the return information needed so I got stuck with the items even after contacting them several times! 2) Now I'm stuck w/items I Don't want, so I have to pay my bill via Amazon website which transfers U to Chase - beyond horrible!!!!!!!!! NEVER GET THE AMAZON VISA CARD/CHASE - YOU CAN DO MUCH BETTER REWARDS WISE & NOT HAVE TO JUMP THRU FLAMING HOOPS TO PAY UR DANG BILL!!!!!!!!!!!!!

title: Did not deliver and won't replace or refund
text: I ordered something off Amazon at the end of Jan and it still has not been delivered and it's now middle of March. I originally ordered it to be next day delivery and it did not arrive then I had to leave the country and have only just returned to find it has not been delivered. When I spoke to customer service they said I cannot have a refund or a replacement as its been longer than 30 days?? But I was out of the country and it's their fault they did not deliver!

title: Amazon are typical CROOKS i had bought…
text: these are typical CROOKS i had bought some equipment in amazon the guy yesterday told me that i will get an idem of my choice when did my return I have issues with Verizon they let criminals on my network I have 3 letters that state they were not going to help m,e sure enough here i am this guy took what was giving top me gave me some oneses account in amazon and took my money. This is a gook that works for them. He deactivated my account and he took my idem told me not t0po return it but itr was already returned locked me out and cut comunication off. THE AMERICAN PEOPLE MADE AMAZON GARBAGE RICH YOU AND I SHOULD BE ASHAMED OF OUR SELVES FOR LETTING IT HAPPEN THIS GOOK IS DIRT OF EARTH and he is a crook The way amazon is set up its a Phonie stealing from everyone the people that work their are sneeky cowards and all from the phillippines not trustworthy and they think they are better than us DO YOUR SELF A FAVOR GIVE THE BUSINESS MAN THE MONEY NOT THE SNEEKS TONIGHT MY WIFE IS DOING A FTC AND A CREDIT CARD COMPLAINT WITH CFPB the online comunity is ruing everyday life for everyone and you dont6 see it what a shame SHAME ON YOU

title: I don't know what kind of scam going on…
text: I don't know what kind of scam going on in the Warehouse of Amazon, I returned two mobiles and didn't get a refund. after 20 days, I didnt get a refund so I contacted to customer service. The first time they said I send junk product, second time said empty box. they are not sure and keep changing the statement . I contacted with UPS office, and they said that the weight of the product to deliver to my home is the exactly the same weight as the pick up from my home for both of the mobiles so how the box will be empty? I need proof that the box i returned has junk by image so customer service told me that amazon destroyed the box without letting me know. I have a right to see my empty box or junk inside the image but customer service said that it is destroyed what a joke and I am not the one customer who is struggling with this problem, I saw another customer review with the same problem, he also described the same problem like me. if amazon goes to check this issue may be more customers will have this issue, customer service keeps sending the same email and harassing me. that they are not going to refund my money. More than 1000 dollars is gone from my pocket and they are not refunding my money, customer service is very rude and cut the call not help, and not providing me any investigation details.

title: Like many on here
text: Like many on here, I decided to cancel my Prime membership after 20 something years. It's clear that Amazon has no concept of managing their supply chain and are so deceptive to customers, it's amazing how they get away with it. They increase Prime membership yet the majority of product takes several days or delivery AND if you find the same product with 2nd day delivery, it's marked up significantly higher than the same product with several day delivery. So, we are paying higher cost for membership and then higher cost for product to take advantage of the membership. Go to Walmart - less expensive, better product availability, 1-2 day free shipping. Amazon is horrible!

title: Dont order from amazon if ...........
text: Dont order from amazon if ............ your expecting a delivery on a certain day , it wont arrive !! why pay for amazon prime if it cant keep its end of the deal and deliver orders on time , ordered something told arrival will be in 2 days , 2 days later , there has been a delay it will arrive the next day , waited in all day the next day , no show and no updates on my order within amazon to tell me what time it will arrive or where it actually is !!! they just left me standing , so went ahead and cancelled amazon prime , oh well their loss !!!

title: Amazon refuse to acknowledge poor customer service.
text: Amazon sent me a faulty product.Amazon failed to turn up to collect their faulty product.Amazon made it very difficult to complain.Amazon collected their faulty product at the second attempt but failed to refund me. Amazon customer service took all my details but failed to help and passed me to someone else to repeat the process.Amazon customer service then explained that it was my fault that they failed to turn up to collect their faulty product.Amazon customer service then said that even though their system did not acknowledge any fault by Amazon they would give me a refund.Amazon customer service then hung up and did not give me a refund. Amazon customer service really struggle because their systems do not accept Amazon failures.Amazon customer service is fundamentally rubbish.

title: WORST service
text: WORST service, products, and customer service. This company is constantly delivering my items to other houses...I've had the same adress for several years. They also are sending me things I didn't order or changing prices on your item.Wish there was a way to shut them down

title: Amazon lies.
text: Amazon claims that you will receive goods the next day. The majority of the time, it will take a couple of days to receive an item. They also advertised their Amazon movies. But most of them, you have to pay for them. Shoppers beware, most of the time, Amazon is not the cheapest. Just go to the store and get the item now.

title: Poor Customer Service. Broken Agreements
text: Amazon charges for Prime service, then offers 2 and 3 day shipping as a benefit for your paying more that $100 annually for it. However, they reserve the right to break this agreement when it suits them. If for whatever reason they can't get your item to you within the time stated (even though it's listed as a prime item) the excuses from customer service vary from "The item wasn't in one of our depots" to "This item has been delayed and hasn't reached your local facility" or just plain lies promising the delivery will make it the next day. So don't count on, or expect an item to be delivered when promised. And don't expect to be treated like a "Prime" customer when you call for answers. Their customer service supervisors will be rude when they feel like it, and just hang up on you if they want and apparently there's no path of escalation for this behavior. I've canceled all of my recurring subscriptions and will cancel my Prime membership before it renews. Amazon is very convenient, but it's not worth the frustration, stress and rude treatment I've received from their customer service team.

title: Worst customer service
text: Worst customer service. I’ve contacted them 3 separate times to schedule pick up of items I never even ordered because I did not want to throw them away. Was disconnected several times and the picks ups all 3 times were scheduled to the wrong address. Bunch of uneducated, unhelpful, incompetent people working for them.

title: I had numerous errors from Amazon and…
text: I had numerous errors from Amazon and they closed my account for days due to their error! I had to go by Apple TV’s. Then the email stating it was a mistake. I asked that the refund me for my Apple TV’s and I have heard nothing. This company is awful. Won’t even fix the issue they caused! I’m truly disappointed because I bought so much fire products.

title: I bought a barbecue from Amazon to find…
text: I bought a barbecue from Amazon to find out after 10 days they return the parcel and refund me the money without I receiving the parcel, excuse was that the parcel was damage which is not true they could not supply item from beginning and the light to me.

title: Amazon removed the review comments…
text: Amazon removed the review comments feature. Their excuse was it wasn't used much. That's just stating the obvious because 1. They were hidden unless the link for showing comments was clicked on and 2. They weren't accessible from the mobile website.Doing this is nothing but vile. Whoever decided the review comments feature should be removed must be on drugs and deserves to be thrown off a building. It causes me fatigue and sulk each time I think about it. Amazon are so wicked for removing what I thought was such a valuable feature. It's just unbelievable they did such a thing.

title: Took delivery of a Minix air purifier…
text: Took delivery of a Minix air purifier and the second pair of free filters were not delivered with the order. Contacted amazon and as usual, they would not send the filter pack on its own, even though they made the mistake and are sole by amazon separately? I now have to wait in from 8 till 8 for the unit to be collected, get a refund and then go through the whole prosses again. So at the moment and having to order a second unit, due to low stock, I am now over £640 out of pocked and have no unit. Not great and a great inconvenience and cost to all involved, why they could not just send a filter pack is beyond reson.

title: Amazon is scamming people for money
text: Packages not being delivered an the ones they do left unattended even though i have a sign hanging that says dnt leave unattended,taking money off my card an no one knows for what haven't gotten that refund, made a order for a computer for my son bday after they took the money now the delivery date is changed for 5 days later an it wont be here on time

title: I would give this company a zero, if I could!
text: I have been an Amazon Prime member for over 10 years. I understand there may be a delay in shipping for some items, but when an item has left their facility that is 30 minutes from my house at 5:20 am, it should be to my house by the guaranteed delivery time of 9 pm. I just spoke to Jeremy, who is apparently a manager or supervisor living in South Africa, and was told that the delay was due to COVID and he did not know where my package was. He did tell me that it could be at the post office, or possibly even on the side of the road, he just didn't know! What a joke! Why do we pay for Prime when the guaranteed delivery time is not guaranteed and all customer service can say is that they are sorry, they don't know where the package is, there is nothing they can do, and the delay is definitely COVID related!

title: DelIvery people SUCK
text: Their products are great but delivery is the worst. Their drivers don't give a damn. They leave packages in the lobby of the building even though many sign says not to because the packages are being stolen. I confronted one of the delivery persons about leaving packages in the lobby and they told me this is not their problem

title: Long term customer feed up with Prime and being messed about.
text: I've been an Amazon customer since it started in the UK. I got Prime when it first started and for many years bought a year membership. My daughter called about a query and they cancelled the member without asking and now I have to pay monthly. Prime stuff often takes days to arrive and I never know when it's coming so I spend days waiting for delivery. I order from them because I struggle with my health but I'm so disappointed with the service that I am starting to purchase elsewhere and finding stuff cheaper and getting better deliveries. Amazon's loss others gain.

title: Terrible terrible customer service…
text: Terrible terrible customer service today!! Have not experienced that in all my time w Amazon....boo!!!! To bad your company can’t get that piece right. We (the customers) helped build your empire, treat us right. Solve the problem or fix it. Not that hard of a concept. Don’t offer me 10% off of a fire stick remote when YOU deemed it defective! Purchased six month ago and it’s defective....that’s on you. I know a remote is small but the point is I paid for it once and it’s defective.....it’s the principal of the thing

title: Very poor experience
text: Very poor experience. I made a purchase of some sleep phones for me and my wife, they didnt work at blocking out noise on the airplane. I sent them both back in the same box. They only gave me a refund for one pair and not the other. They said they didnt receive the 2nd pair and finally after 4 weeks found it but said it was damaged and charged me for it. Very poor business acumen

title: They let my order sit there until it…
text: They let my order sit there until it was late, then told me because I chose free shipping they are just letting it sit there. Placed another order same thing. Called after ten days, on a Saturday and told my order will be here by Monday when they have not even bothered to ship it yet. Some Indian rep assuring me I will get it by Monday, because that is what the tracking app is saying now. Called them, and Mexico rep says he cannot do anything, wants to call me back on Monday and said I cannot even cancel my order over the weekend. I ordered two expensive programming books so I could get free shipping, only now they don't bother to ship if choose that option. My programming project is delayed. Not going to order from Amazon anymore. They will let your order sit there, and then you have to spend hours arguing with foreign reps who lie and can't help, just to get them to ship your already late order. I have also received counterfeit very poor quality items from them multiple times. They are putting U.S. companies out of business by counterfeiting, and ripping off customers.

title: If you are thinking of using Amazon…
text: If you are thinking of using Amazon please think again I ordered somethiing 5 days ago should have been delivered on the 18/11/18 by 9pm guess what no parcel checked on Amazon and it says order was deliverd Oh no it wasn't I'll not be using them again Took my money quick enough I would not even give one star

title: Bad experience trying to buy a Pitboss Grill
text: Bought a Pitboss kc grill combo and received one that was previously opened and was damaged, tried to file for a return immediately and received intimation that i would have to take it into a Pitboss service center (nearly 140 miles) away. Nasty service from such an highly respected company.

title: Delivering wrong items or packages with…
text: Delivering wrong items or packages with no items insideOne recommendation is to develop further private brands for Amazon, because the company already has industry strength introducing more of their own brands into the market would benefit their brand. Having more private brands would make Amazon a more competitive company and also reducing the price of items

title: To many pay per view films
text: The most frustrating thing about prime video is that despite already paying a monthly subscription a lot of the film content is still pay per view.Tonight wanted to watch mirical on 34th street, a Christmas classic, and was so disappointed to find that all the popular version even though the black and white option was pay per view.Amazon appears to be more about making money than customers satisfaction.

title: Prices getting marked up and then giving discount
text: Items usually are good but prices get marked up alot. During the last Prime day they had a Lavazza LB400 machine with 40% off for $139.99Today I see the exact same item with just 20% off for the same $139.99 and on top of that an extra 20% coupon, bringing the item price down to $111.99Why the hell do I pay for Prime AND get a prime day deal if the item is now being sold way cheaper??? The markup price of the item during Prime day was $349.99 and now it's marked as $175. That's just bull****.

title: Amazon not paying full refund
text: I have noticed recently that Amazon likes to bundle items together in one parcel or envelope which is fair enough as saved paper, postage & petrol however on more than one occasion when I have returned items only one shows up on the return label so I have not been refunded for the other items. I have begun to wonder if Amazon is doing this deliberately to keep the excess. It will say on my account I have been refunded but I don’t receive the full amount. Trying to get help on their automated system is a nightmare as it does not recognise the problem!

title: lazy delivery drivers
text: Whilst Amazon are good for a quick delivery, I found that some of the delivery drivers couldn't care if you get your package or not. My last order was left outside for anyone to come along and take it. They didn't even ring my doorbell.

title: Amazon very seldom ships on times as stated on products.
text: Amazon is convenient and I’ve been paying for a subscription.I’m cancelling subscription because I seldom get shipping times stated on their products. Very frustrating.

title: Amazon has the worst customer service ever.
text: Amazon is fine most of the time. But damn the customer service is the worst i have ever experienced. 1st of all they are not in US, so language barrier is crazy. 2nd of all they literally lie and do nothing to help besides read the tracking information. I asked them why my package was delayed when it arrived in my city center the day before. now it left my facility and went to 5 cities away. she replayed with they didn't have it in that one, which is dumb because it got shipped from texas to my facility. lol this is absolutely crap and then she told me all i can do is wait. terrible. Jeff Bezos needs to spend some of his billions on customer service within the US. nad lots of training.

title: I like Amazon but sometimes not drivers
text: Some Amazon delivery drivers are very unprofessional (compared to Fed Ex or UPS for example). They often run over my lawn putting ruts in it. They sometimes run over my driveway markers (which are there to prevent vehicles from running into the culvert). I live on a narrow street and they often use my driveway as a turnaround when they are NOT making a delivery to my house. My driveway is asphalt and I am seeing damage caused by heavy trucks.

title: Amazon -- Downhill since 2017.
text: Amazon use to be amazing. They lured us in with a fair Prime yearly fee, and customer support at right out your fingertips. They had special discounted prices on video games, and parcels were always packed carefully and on time. From around late 2017 and beyond, they've officially have become a sleazy superpower. Here's a sample of why:1) Yearly Prime fee increases 2) Customer Service is mainly outsourced with completely clueless and incompetent help. They're about as useful as as the animatronics found in Disney parks. It's not their fault - it's Amazon!3) Discounts on electronic gaming removed.4) Telephone # for help cleverly hidden among layers of nonsense. The phone number use to be right on the screen at all times.5) Most small shipments even if fragile, will ship in padded envelopes, which results in squashed packaging. They use to box items like that.6) Prime shipping dates have become a joke. Every week there are late shipments, despite the "Order now and receive it by". BULL!7) No more compensation for late shipments. Just a "sorry"8) Jeff Bezos is the richest man in the universe, thanks to us, yet, they cut corners on everything. Why? Because they know they have you. The other large stores need to up their game so Amazon doesn't continue to get away with this. This my friends, is what happens when a corp becomes all too powerful. Amazon is the ultimate monopoly.

title: I had an error on my kindle account…
text: I had an error on my kindle account that kept me from reading my textbook out loud. Basically no one could figure out the issue so they just keep passing me around to different representatives and I would basically start the process over of explaining the situation again. They would be nice at first but by the end, they would just randomly disconnect.

title: Bought a pair of Bearpaw boots
text: Bought a pair of Bearpaw boots. I received the boots with a flaw. Amazon won’t let me post a review with the issues I had and rejected my review stating the condition I received the boots in. I’ve had other issues with Amazon also. So I am done ordering anything from them. They’re getting to big for their own good!

title: 50% of sellers are scammers with fake reviews
text: 50% of sellers are scammers who buy fake reviews. some products contain more then hundreds of 5 star reviews in a single day. amazon does not solve fake reviews at all or solves them very slowly. if the amazon deletes the false reviews after a long time, next fake reviews will appear within a few days. It is difficult to find an honest seller and quality product.

title: The customer service is terrible in…
text: The customer service is terrible in Amazon. I was having trouble with being charged from Amazon for no reason. They claimed that I have the kindle membership and also the kindle music. I talked to the bank and disputed, but I got charges every month. Then I called Amazon trying to resolve the issue, they are not very cooperative. I recommend anyone who has Amazon account to check if they are charged mysteriously from them. Their stock price and revenue continue to be up, but I am question if it is because of the reason I just stated above. At the end, I gave up, I have to cancel my credit card and concluded it as a fraud to get my money back. It is a terrible process.

title: They should verify what sellers are…
text: They should verify what sellers are selling... a solar panel of 10 by 20 cm can never be 50wp as an example.Solarchargers of type mppt that are not that type at all, bad performances. Not every buyer is an expert.And all these rubbish sellers are bad for Amazon, despite Amazons good delivery procedures

title: Long time Prime Member That May Change
text: Long time Prime Member.They raise the membership fee by a lot and take away 2 day shipping gurantee. I just bought something that is coming from Amazon and it's going to take a week. The quality of products has dropped. If I search for "Asus" why is the first page filled with your "sponsored" stuff that is not what I searched for? And most of it is Temu garbage. I think it's time we start shopping around more...

title: Multiple failures to deliver packages
text: I've ordered from Amazon countless times, most of the time I do get the packages. Sadly now and then they fail to deliver the items, and just recently they've failed once again to deliver.To say that it's annoying is an understatement. Clearly they really need to improve on this. 3 stars because they have previously managed to deliver items, but also failed to deliver items.

title: Delivery delays and customer service ignoring
text: Constantly requested redelivery of my item and my request was ignored time and time again. My mop arrived 6 days later than planned. Once it came I was very happy with it though so worth the wait.

title: My experience with a missing item was…
text: My experience with a missing item was really frustrating, for days nothing happened they didn't even took my case serious. Then day after day I annoyed the hell out of them. I wrote them multiple times a day while complaining. I contacted the delivery company which is in my eyes partly responsible. They ignored me for whole 7 days. I also did contact the manufacturer but Amazon still didn't really feel the pressure. So I decided to annoy again and again and again and again until I had another idea. Let's just directly mail Andy Jassy the ceo of Amazon which I did next. I did mention that in the customer support chat and 10 seconds later I got reconnected to someone from problem prevention or something like that and then I explained to them everything again and then 15 min later I'm not even joking they organized a replacement order just like that. Finally!!!!!? But I have really mixed feelings about all the hassle you have to go through first until you mention Andy Jassy and suddenly everything goes really fast. Don't know how to feel about that hence the 3 stars. You should be like that without that I feel I have to pressure Amazon in such a way and annoy them until something is happening. Being relentless paid off but shouldn't be necessary to be honest

title: How do you rate amazon's delivery
text: Amazon is one of the famous companies to provide an online efficient shopping experience. However, when comes to delivery, they do not have the best delivery system. I cannot tell whether my items were stolen or they were not delivered at all equals a scam. I bought items such as ram, facewash, sweatshirt, earplug, gaming controller that were not delivered at all. They are more hesitant to refund or replace an item. I believe there are few articles about amazon services that you can search about. I am just unsatisfied with amazon's delievery services.

title: Usually you find what your looking for…
text: Usually you find what your looking for on Amazon but they can be a little pricey plus shipping and tax adds to the price. If you sign up for thank you and rewards points thru citi.com that helps.

title: Like the idea of one day delivery although high P&p costs
text: Like the idea of one day delivery with prime. Needs to be more products with prime and postage n packaging costs need to be removed as these are quite high for some products making ordering online pointless and a waste of money

title: Amazon Sucks
text: Try to place an order and they tell me they will get back with me in 24 hours. Been a week. Is this the best this rich greedy jerk can do?

title: I'm 50-50 on Amazon
text: I'm 50-50 on Amazon. There are sales happening all the time whether it being a small one or a big one. I bought an item from them and it came perfectly well. No blemishes, no defects, works as advertised and great. But the delivery wasn't. Firstly, I was promised 2 day delivery. 2 days later, I checked the status only to realize that it will be delayed till the end of the week. And this isn't the first time too. Amazon really need to work on their delivery consistency.

title: Fast and efficient delivery, but...
text: Fast and efficient delivery, (prime customer). However, Prime Day deals are a rip off really, some items only a marginal discount and only ever seem to really push their own products!!

title: I LOVE AMAZON.....
text: It has become my go to place for all my shopping. I really am un-happy about the new tracking/targeting system. I feel that they are now charging me more for idem's that I may want. So I am now more careful about what I buy there and shop around more. I use to be a faithful Amazon shopper. Just a bad management decision. Amazon has lost 40% of my business because of this. But they have lots of money... :)

title: No Packaging
text: Often buy through Amazon and never really have any problem . Have had drivers leave parcel at front door in full view of the road and then return to van without even knocking or ringing the bell. but still surprised at all of the negative reviews.My complaint with my recent order is the fact it did not come in ANY packaging.Trainers for my adult son arrived with NO packaging at all, just in their shoe box which was not even taped down.The lid was actually open.I had left a note on door to say please leave over gate if I’m out, so glad I was back home as it was pouring with rain and would have had sodden box and shoes.Guess this is down to the seller.

title: Amazon has pros and cons - Good overall!
text: Amazon has it's pros and cons, but one thing they usually have going for them is good return policies!I know that not all Amazon sellers are required to adhere to the standard return policy, but that is shown on the item page where the item is sold. If you check that, and order only RETURNABLE items, and check the specific return policy for certain items - should be a good experience.I've placed literally hundreds of orders through Amazon, and 98% of the time, I've been satisfied either with the product I received, or a full refund.The only reason I'm not giving Amazon 5 stars is because they definitely have room for improvement, and I don't like how they've impacted the business of so many local brick-and-mortar stores.

title: Mistakes handled excellently.
text: As I'm sure most of us do years Amazon a launch since covid.... It is rarley I have an issue....I had a strange package delivered instead of the 3 items I ordered......The website is a little like chasing your own tail before you give up and find a way into contact customer service representative that is unfortunate however once. You get disking turn live person and explain the problem they're take care of it exalt company.

title: Do not trust Amazon Reviews.
text: I purchased roofracks from Amazon for a Skoda Fabia Combi (Estate) 2021. They are poorly designed, flimsy and normal priced. They returned and refunded the purchase. Good. BUT. They would not accept my nice, but truthful review. Therefore do NOT trust their REVIEWS. At an Auto Shop, Feu Vert, in Gandia, Valencia, I bought beautifully engineered, Italian made roofracks for only 15€ more!!!

title: Always Been PRIME!
text: Never had an issue with Amazon. Gave me a return once when I refused a product. Always on time with delivery and never broken/unusable. Great for random things you have trouble finding otherwise...I bought a Fire TV from them for Black Friday and it has been pretty darn good! I do really, REALLY, recommend having a Prime account. It has so many valuable assets to it; music, TV and movies, free shipping, etc.

title: Satisfied and impressed customer
text: So I received an amazon gift card from someone and I wanted to use it to buy some things from amazon. The gift card number would not work. So I thought I would have to call customer service. But then the next day, I downloaded the amazon shop app from google play store on my phone. And then I scanned the giftcard through the app, and thankfully it worked. I ordered what I needed to order and luckily I was offered amazon prime free for a month to use. When I received the items, I decided to return one product back because I didnt love it, so I initiated a return online for that product. The instructions for the return were to pack it back up and include a printed out receipt inside. And no need to put the address or postage or anything on the outside. Amazon Prime person would come to my door the next business day and pick up that item and I will be credited. I chose to get amazon credit when I was filing the return online. The very next day, I got the email that I got a refund and the credit was in my amazon account. Completely satisfied with the amazon service so far. No issues for me. Would like amazon to be better at recognizing gift cards entered manually!

title: Amazon used to be 100%
text: Amazon used to be 100% one day delivery, but anymore it's totally hit and miss. Even when you order something 'in stock' it comes late because it was out of stock. Amazon is slipping.

title: Place to buy
text: Usually, everything works fine. If something gets wrong they fix it quickly. Best customer service I've seen, ever !Just don't buy things not shipped BY amazon

title: Great array of products available
text: Great array of products available. My son has amazon prime and let’s me use it. It’s very helpful when needed to get things quicker.

title: A rare reliable company.
text: Does what it says on the tin - and fixes it fast if it makes a mistake.Watch out for third party sellers selling via Amazon - I always buy direct from Amazon where possible.

title: Support is good and a wide range of …
text: Support is good and a wide range of products ! but my order arrived 1 day later than what had been announced by Amazon...

title: I like the shipping time except the price
text: Same item I find the price much higher than ebay or other webstores. Amazon make a lot of money, customers pay for them.

title: What could I expect from a top notch massive company, other than they get 2 of my books wrong.
text: Seems like the boys in shipping dozed off and put in two of the wrong books. How does this happen in a company like this I don't know. Actually, you know how -----> HUMAN ERROR. "Can't we all just get along" I once heard a wise man say... But honestly, I think we'll all get along together before we humans ever stop making mistakes! So I forgiiiiiive you Amazonians. That's my story and I'm sticking to it ;) Laugh if you got the cashgh, otherwise laugh anyways cause yo mama's a punk. Ps. Can you believe I'm a judge! U can take the goof out of a twitface, but you can't take the twitface out of the goof. Ain't that the truth!

title: A great, well honed buying experience
text: Amazon have got the buying experience down to a tee. Good product descriptions, excellent reviews (even the bad ones). Have recently noticed that prices aren't quite as competitive as they once were.

title: I love amazon
text: I love amazon! I use it for half my shopping. The prime membership is worth it as you can receive free 2-day shipping on most purchases. The online store also has almost anything you can think of ranging from toiletries, clothes, to electronics and furniture!

title: Good convenient online shopping.
text: I can’t fault their service! I have found their products to be comparable to other online businesses. Yes, they do offer Premium, and most people pay for this, including myself. Not everything is Premium, but I am very happy with the service. I am not keen on having to pay for the ad free Prime Video. That’s been recently introduced and it’s very costly when added onto the monthly subscription.

title: Well i have been a customer for a year…
text: Well i have been a customer for a year now!Prime and Paramount Plus of course !Yellowstone of course !From Montréal everything i bought so far good quality and fast service and a lab top at 75% off great buy !So far great !The only thing was( dog food Salmon )Wich my dog didnot want to eat !Complex for return ......

title: Happy buyer of Amazon products
text: I love buying on amazon the shipping is fast and you can track the shipment…You know when to expect when your package to receive your package or they give you date when it possible to receive it…

title: By far the best online delivery…
text: By far the best online delivery platform second to non, everything I have ordered for the past one year has been up to standard and I’m very happy about it.

title: Highly recommended. A masterpiece.
text: The best website. Highly recommend it. I bought three things there now. They arrived fast and the items were very good. They have amazing customer support. I highly recommend it. It's the best website I have ever used. Truly a masterpiece.

title: amazon :);)
text: amazon is a great cheap good quality its an amazing site whith many things to buy i think all and all its amazing , i buy all my chocolate and yankee candles from there .

title: Amazon has everything I want
text: Amazon has everything I want, from books to specific cables and groceries. It just works. I just received a wrong item and they refunded it immediately. Thank you for the great customer support.

title: We just love Amazon so much
text: We just love Amazon so much. They truly understand customer service and helping a customer feel satisfied with the entire transaction start to finish. I just wanted to write a review thanking the good customer service, products and selection that we have come to love from Amazon.

title: So easy to find an item
text: So easy to find an item, compare and purchase. Love all the reviews too which make it really easy to assess whether the purchase makes sense. I'm a big fan of Amazon!

title: I've got to hand it to Amazon
text: I've got to hand it to Amazon: I have never (rarely?) paid for shipping, and *everytime* I have a return I have a credit in my account the same day I drop the product with the courier. Seriously - I have issues with Bezos' oligarch status in modern American society but this company is a Rockstar (with Christmas shopping I had three vendor issues this weekend and two of the vendors blew remedy and I've dropped my patronage, but Amazon fixed it in the first three minutes of my raising it to their attention. I mean seriously - that's greater customer service).

title: I had my ups and downs with Amazon but…
text: I had my ups and downs with Amazon but at the end of the day I still use them. You can't beat the selection of merchandise or the customer service. GOOGLE should take a lesson from AMAZON.

title: Best customer service.
text: I've been using Amazon here and there for a while now with no problems. My shipment came in damaged. I didn't expect anything but complained to Amazon about the packaging. They sent me a replacement and refunded my money the next day. This is the best customer service I've ever seen. I am more than satisfied with their service.

title: The sheer scale of the offerings and…
text: The sheer scale of the offerings and ability to be price competitive on seemingly almost all of those items is shockingly good. More and more of my spending goes to them.

title: I love love love amazon
text: I love love love amazon. You can get anything you need and everything you need from this site. Sometimes there are problems but for the most part it always seems to work great!

title: I love Amazon!
text: I love Amazon!! Incredibly reliable and will always sort out any mishaps that may occur. I buy everything off Amazon.One of the best online shopping websites I have ever used.

title: Excellent - love prime services
text: Use all the time. Am a (student) prime member and love the next day delivery + option to opt out and get voucher. Also use prime video, Lenders library, kindle first, subscribe and save, and prime music, which are all excellent. Great customer service if anything goes wrong.

title: Everything you can find
text: Amazon is one of my favorite site. You can find everything you want here and cheaper than that in the store. Prime member enjoy 2 days free shipping. I love amazon.

title: AMAZON ROCKS
text: First of all I have the need to let everybody know that "AMAZON ROCKS" buying thru them have been a Worry Free Experience every time even when you buy from a third party seller with an abusive return policy like the one described bellow Amazon always has stand by me (The Costumer) . I had an abusive return experience from HVAC / IAQ SUPPLY they charge me almost 50% of the cost of the item just because I decided to return the item in the same condition I received it, plus you need to expend your own money to ship it back to them .If you buy from them make sure you really going to keep it if not you will suffer the consequences. The key included makes it very difficult to screw on and off. For the price sold it should have an screw driver key included but it did not. This same review will post on Google as well.

title: Excellent deal: product and service
text: Very happy with the recent DVD promotions. The live chat feature helped me know what I could order and the delivered products exceeded my expecatations. Thank you!

title: Love Them!
text: By far the best place to shop online. Fast shipping (even the free shipping is super fast most the time). Customer service is excellent and they go above and beyond if any problem arises. Always my first stop!

title: Easy to order and quick deliveries
text: I have only orderes books from Amazoon, but they arrive quickly and it is an easy way to order :-) Too bad that they don't send "everything" to my country, have tried ordering toys a couple of times with no luck.

title: Can't find is anywhere - Try Amazon
text: I have been able to find many product that I have searched for on line but again I should have looked at Amazon first, it would have saved me a lot of trouble.

title: DonPanco LX
text: Free calls to Rebtel users and cheap international calling to everyone else – Use WiFi, 3G or local minutes to make calls - Sign up and get started calling in 30 seconds!

title: Perfect
text: Never had a bad time with these guys. Good selection, accurate delivery times, good condition and timely arrivals. Can't be faulted. On the two times I've had to talk to a customer support person they proved pretty up to the task too.

title: Great prices..... bargains here!
text: I love shopping on Amazon! Get some very good deals! No problem with service! Website easy to navigate around! Amazon is usually the first port of call when I want to find something at bargain prices!
